name: Math Algebra
subject: math
description: Explore patterns, variables, equations, and functions from basics to advanced algebra

skills.name: Patterns & Sequences
skills.description: Recognize, describe, and extend number patterns and sequences

skills.name: Variables & Expressions
skills.description: Understand variables, write and evaluate algebraic expressions

skills.name: Equations & Inequalities
skills.description: Solve linear equations and inequalities with one variable

skills.name: Functions & Graphs
skills.description: Understand functions, graph linear equations, interpret slope and intercepts

skills.name: Systems of Equations
skills.description: Solve systems of equations using graphing, substitution, and elimination

skills.name: Polynomials & Factoring
skills.description: Add, subtract, multiply polynomials and factor expressions

skills.name: Quadratics
skills.description: Solve quadratic equations and understand parabolas
